name: No Exit Agent Team Theater
purpose: Runnable live Agent Team example: three teammates improvise Sartre's No Exit pressure structure round by round, without a prewritten script.

monitor.command: node scripts/cc4pm.js theater-monitor --team no-exit-live-tts --summaries "加尔森台词,伊内丝台词,艾丝黛尔台词"
monitor.dryRunCommand: node scripts/cc4pm.js theater-monitor --team no-exit-live-tts --summaries "加尔森台词,伊内丝台词,艾丝黛尔台词" --dry-run
notes: The monitor reads ~/.claude/teams/<team-name>/inboxes/team-lead.json; prepare an empty [] file there before starting the monitor if your harness has not created it yet.
Default theater-monitor mappings support teammate names garcin, ines, and estelle directly. Use --map only if your teammate names differ.

summaryRule.rule: Every teammate-message summary must contain the speaking role's exact marker: 加尔森台词 / 伊内丝台词 / 艾丝黛尔台词.

examples.estelle: 第1轮 艾丝黛尔台词

stage.punishment: mutual gaze: each role becomes jailer, mirror, judge, and temptation for the other two

liveRules: Live only: do not ask any teammate to draft all three rounds or write a complete scene.
Each teammate plays exactly one role and never writes dialogue for the other two.
Each turn produces one in-character line or very short paragraph, not analysis or narration.
Round prompts should include the relevant previous lines so teammates react to each other instead of to a static script.

rounds.name: Self-defense and demand recognition
rounds.driverInstruction: Ask each teammate for one first line: defend the role's self-image and demand recognition from the room.

rounds.name: Respond and attack
rounds.driverInstruction: After collecting round 1, send each teammate the other two lines and ask them to respond, attack, expose, seduce, or plead from their own role pressure.

rounds.name: No-exit state
rounds.driverInstruction: After collecting round 2, ask each teammate to show how needing recognition from the other two is exactly what keeps the role trapped.
